title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
